meta.title: Aaron Molina | Full Stack Jamstack Developer & AI-Powered Web Consultant
meta.description: Full stack Jamstack developer and consultant with {yearsOfExperience}+ years experience. I build high-performance websites and AI-powered applications with Astro, Next.js, Sanity, and Claude Code. Available for hire, remote US or Miami.

hero.name: Aaron Molina
hero.headline: Agentic Software Engineer
hero.description: I build lightning-fast websites and full stack applications that teams love and developers enjoy maintaining. {yearsOfExperience}+ years shipping production code, from headless CMS platforms to AI-powered apps built with Claude Code and OpenAI. I combine deep web development expertise with modern AI tools to deliver results faster.

trustedBy.title: Trusted by Leading Brands
trustedBy.subtitle: I have partnered with teams across sports, travel, and technology

services.title: How I Can Help
services.subtitle: From concept to production, I deliver websites and applications that perform

items.title: Jamstack & Full Stack Development
items.description: High-performance static, hybrid, and full stack applications built with Astro, Next.js, TanStack Start, or your framework of choice. Fast load times, strong SEO, and production-grade architecture.

items.title: Headless CMS Integration
items.description: Connect your team to a modern content platform. I specialize in Sanity, Storyblok, Strapi, and custom CMS solutions that scale with your business and make content editing a breeze.

items.title: AI-Powered Development
items.description: I build applications with AI built in from the start. From OpenAI integrations to AI-augmented workflows with Claude Code and MCP servers, I ship smarter and faster than traditional development.

items.title: React & Frontend Architecture
items.description: Component libraries, design systems, and frontend infrastructure. Clean, typed code with CI/CD pipelines your team can maintain and extend for years to come.

items.title: Enterprise-Proven Experience
items.description: Over a decade shipping production code for startups, agencies, and enterprise clients including the LA Clippers, Miami Heat, Azamara Cruises, and Corsair.

items.title: AI-Augmented Workflow
items.description: I use AI tools like Claude Code, OpenAI, and MCP servers to build faster without cutting corners. I have shipped full stack apps built alongside AI agents from architecture to deployment.

items.title: Quality and Reliability
items.description: TypeScript, automated testing, CI/CD pipelines, and performance optimization are standard practice. I build with best practices from day one to reduce technical debt.

items.title: Consultant and Team Player
items.description: I integrate smoothly into existing teams or lead projects independently. Clear communication, thorough documentation, and collaborative code reviews are how I operate.

aiShowcase.title: Built with AI
aiShowcase.subtitle: Real applications I have shipped using AI-powered development workflows

items.title: Agentic Engineering
items.description: I build production software alongside AI agents end to end, from architecture to deployment. I drive Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, and Cursor with custom MCP servers, skills, and review loops to ship full stack apps like TypeLyft, OneMusicCrate, and ToodyLoo at a pace solo engineers could not hit before. Agents do not replace engineering judgment, they multiply it.

items.title: This Website
items.description: aaronmolina.me itself was built with AI assistance using Claude Code. Astro, Tailwind CSS v4, content collections, GSAP animations, and SEO-optimized architecture, all developed using an AI-augmented workflow.

items.title: MCP Server Integrations
items.description: I build and configure Model Context Protocol servers that connect AI coding assistants to external tools. From database queries to API integrations, MCP servers supercharge development workflows.

blog.title: Latest Articles
blog.subtitle: Thoughts on web development, AI-powered workflows, Jamstack, and frontend architecture

cta.title: Looking for a Full Stack Developer?
cta.description: Whether you need a new website, a headless CMS migration, an AI-powered application, or help scaling your frontend team, I am ready to help. Let's talk about your project.
